primary.$description: Active arc fill for primary spinner.

secondary.$description: Active arc fill for secondary spinner. Uses secondary icon color.

inverse.$description: Active arc fill for inverse spinner. White on dark backgrounds.

primary.$description: Trail arc fill for primary spinner. Same hue as active arc, rendered at 25% opacity.

secondary.$description: Trail arc fill for secondary spinner. Same hue as active arc, rendered at 25% opacity.

inverse.$description: Trail arc fill for inverse spinner. Same hue as active arc, rendered at 25% opacity.

opacity.$description: Trail arc opacity. Applied to trail fill to create the inactive segment.

small.$description: Small spinner size (24px). Default inline size.

medium.$description: Medium spinner size (32px). Used in buttons and cards.

large.$description: Large spinner size (72px). Full-page or section loading.
